summary: The diff addresses REQ-28 by fixing car listings not appearing on the Home page and Listings browse page. Changes include: backend migration module added, sample listings embedded directly in main.mo, frontend useQueries.ts hooks updated to fetch and return listings correctly (including fallback logic for getListingById), CarCard.tsx updated to render listing details with placeholder handling, Home.tsx and Listings.tsx updated to use useGetAllListings and render CarCard components, and ListingDetail.tsx fixed for correct id passing. The fix covers backend getAllListings returning sample data, frontend fetching and rendering, and individual card display of car details.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) added as a separate file with a run() identity function for stable memory migration
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-28 only asked to fix listings not showing; adding a migration module was not requested and goes beyond diagnosing/fixing the listing display issue

hallucinated_features.description: useCreateCallbackRequest exported as an alias for useAddCallbackRequest for backward compatibility
hallucinated_features.reason: This alias export was not mentioned in REQ-28 or any other requirement in the build request

hallucinated_features.description: BigInt-in-query-key lint error fix in useFilterListings by serializing bigint filter values to strings in the query key
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-28 focused on getAllListings and rendering; fixing a lint error in useFilterListings was not part of the requirements
